  • Package com.example.simul2d.grid

    • Class com.example.simul2d.grid.Cell

      class Cell extends Object implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • capacity
          int capacity
        • combatEnabledEntities
          HashMap<Entities,Entity> combatEnabledEntities
        • entities
          HashMap<Entities,Entity> entities
          Map of entities currently present in this cell, keyed by their concrete class. This allows a single concrete entity type to be stored at most once per cell.
        • material
          Material material
          Constructs a new Cell positioned at (0, 0) with an empty entity collection.
        • minGrowthValueToFight
          int minGrowthValueToFight
        • pos
          Vec2 pos
          The position of the cell in the grid.
        • totalGrowthOnCell
          int totalGrowthOnCell
          Aggregated growth across all CanGrow entities in this cell.

          Used by Cell.step() and passed into CanGrow.grow(int) so that individual growth behavior can depend on the cell-level total.

    • Class com.example.simul2d.grid.Grid

      class Grid extends Object implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • columns
          int columns
          The number of columns in the grid.
        • isToric
          boolean isToric
          Flag indicating if the grid is toric (true) or bounded by walls (false).
        • matrix
          Cell[][] matrix
          The 2D array containing the cells of the grid.
        • rows
          int rows
          The number of rows in the grid.

    • Record Class com.example.simul2d.grid.Vec2

      class Vec2 extends Record implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • x
          int x
          The field for the x record component.
        • y
          int y
          The field for the y record component.
